title: Confirmed! Group Captain Shubhanshu Shukla of IAF to fly to International Space Station in May - Check details
description: The Indian Space Research Organisation prepares for a historic milestone as Group Captain Shubhanshu Shukla becomes the first Indian to visit the ISS in May 2025, marking over 40 years since Rakesh Sharma's 1984 mission.
